meaning: Universal Data Access,通用数据访问
examples: Wide industry support - Many vendors including Microsoft have already announced support for the UDA standards.
There was a flow of security-force information to the UDA: perhaps 85% of its intelligence came from official sources.
Several hundred people followed the coffin which was draped in a UDA flag, beret and gloves.
The UDA ceasefire - in spite of its flaws - was another important factor.
UDA's announcement this time was undermined by the refusal to hand over its guns.
